26.reason: [The problem requires right child to be >= root, but this code only inserts when data > root->data, ignoring equal values. This causes duplicate values to be dropped, leading to incorrect tree structure and missing leaf nodes.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The problem requires right child to be >= root, but this code only inserts when data > root->data, ignoring equal values. This causes duplicate values to be dropped, leading to incorrect tree structure and missing leaf nodes.]
